title: Big Time Currency
description:
A mod adding a simple diamond-based system of in-game currency for servers!
Good for player economies or anything else that needs money.
body:
Welcome to...
# Big Time Currency!
**Big Time Currency** is the first of the Big Time series of mods I develop for my own personal server, **Big Time Ballers**.

**Big Time Currency** is a mod that adds a diamond-based coin (called, fittingly, _Bigcoins_) that are divisible into the smaller fractions of coins called Smallcoins (1/9th of a Diamond) and Tinycoins (1/18th of a Diamond.) Just pop a diamond in a stonecutter to get Bigcoins, then divide them further as needed!

The purpose behind making these coins a super-divisible-diamond is that on smaller servers (like Big Time Ballers), it can be hard to get an economy up and running since diamonds are hard to obtain in the mass quantities needed to buy items. Big Time Currency allows you to sell small quantities of items for small quantities of money that still matter! This also helps navitage the problem of "x stacks for 1 diamond" or not having enough to sell by the stack, but the best pricing being a stack per diamond.

TL;DR, Big Time Currency is for small servers who still want shops without the grind of super-automated farms. Also you can make a stock market if you'd like.
